title: Generating Gaussian Random Numbers via the Box-Muller Transform
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of transforming uniformly distributed random numbers into a standard Gaussian (Normal) distribution using the Box-Muller method.
relationships: U1 and U2 are independent inputs
Transformed via equations: R = sqrt(-2*ln(U1)), θ = 2πU2
Z0 and Z1 are calculated as: Z0 = R*cos(θ), Z1 = R*sin(θ)
